zh.Jedburgh Abbey, Roxburghshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭洛包爾德包
zh.La Roche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Fra: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 洛奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort於1263年3月20日出生在法國艾-吉洛易德時，她的父親Robert IV de Dreux22歲，母親Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort14歲。她於1285年10月15日與Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾德包結婚。她去世於1330年8月2日享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort于1263年3月20日出生在法国艾-吉洛易德时，她的父亲Robert IV de Dreux22岁，母亲Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort14岁。她于1285年10月15日与Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland在英国苏格兰洛包爾德包结婚。她去世于1330年8月2日享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort was born on 20 March 1263, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, her father, Robert IV de Dreux, was 22 and her mother, Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort, was 14. She married Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland on 15 October 1285, in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She died on 2 August 1330, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort est née le 20 mars 1263, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, son père, Robert IV de Dreux, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland le 15 octobre 1285, à Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 2 août 1330, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort am 20. März 1263 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert IV de Dreux 22 und ihre Mutter Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort 14. Sie hat am 15. Oktober 1285 in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland geheiratet. Sie starb am 2. August 1330 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort è nata il il 20 marzo 1263 nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, sua padre, Robert IV de Dreux, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland il 15 ottobre 1285, nel Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 2 agosto 1330, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfortが1263年3月20日にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで生まれた時，父Robert IV de Dreuxは22歳，母Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfortは14歳であった。1285年10月15日にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアジェドブルグでAlexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotlandと結婚した。彼女は1330年8月2日に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort(이)가 1263년 3월 20일 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert IV de Dreux(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1285년 10월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 제드버그에서 Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1330년 8월 2일 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.20 March 1263–2 August 1330: 1263 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 20–1330 оны Наймдугаар сарын 2

pt.20 March 1263–2 August 1330: 20 de março de 1263–2 de agosto de 1330
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort nasceu em 20 de março de 1263, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, França, seu pai, Robert IV de Dreux, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland em 15 de outubro de 1285, em Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1330, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort родилась 20 марта 1263 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert IV de Dreux было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland 15 октября 1285 г. в местности джедбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла 2 августа 1330 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.20 March 1263–2 August 1330: 20 de marzo de 1263–2 de agosto de 1330
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort nació el 20 de marzo de 1263, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, su papá, Robert IV de Dreux, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Alexander III "the Glorious" , King of Scotland el 15 de octubre de 1285, en Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1330, a la edad de 67 años.
